name: Primag AG
summary: Primag AG operates as a residential real estate development company in Germany. The company engages in the identification, acquisition, planning, development, and sale of various residential properties to long-term oriented self-users or investors. It develops luxury apartments and town house villas, as well as renovates old buildings primarily in Dusseldorf. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in D√É¬ºsseldorf, Germany.
